mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.store_id AS storeId, r.user_number AS userNumber, r.category, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.rating, r.created_date AS createdDate, u.user_name AS nickname, u.image_url AS profileImage, (SELECT store_name FROM stores WHERE store_id = r.store_id) AS storeName, (SELECT IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0) FROM reviews WHERE store_id = #{storeId}) AS averageRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE store_id = #{storeId}) AS reviewCount FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_number = u.user_number WHERE r.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY r.created_date DESC
SELECT review_id AS reviewId, user_number AS userNumber, store_id AS storeId, review_content AS reviewContent, rating, created_date AS createdDate FROM reviews WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.rating, r.created_date AS createdDate, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_id AS storeId FROM reviews r JOIN stores s ON r.store_id = s.store_id WHERE r.user_number = #{userNumber} ORDER BY r.created_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookmark (user_number, storeId, prefer) VALUES (#{userNumber}, #{storeId}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, store_address AS storeAddress, store_phone AS storePhone FROM stores WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( store_id, user_number, category, review_content, rating, created_date ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userNumber}, #{category}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating}, NOW() )
